title: Kitchen Roll Holder Free-Standing Paper Towel Holder, Premium Stainless Steel Kitchen Rolls Organizer, Classic Fashion Countertop Dispenser
features: Material: The kitchen roll holder is made of premium stainless steel, with non-slip base and matte black finish, rustproof and waterproof,suit for every style kitchen environment.
Dimensions(H*W*D): 11.8 x 6.7 x 6.7 inches, suitable for various standard sizes of paper rolls, make the paper holder organized convenience.
Stable Base: The base with non-slip silicone pads on the bottom to prevent the paper holder from moving out of place,Moreover, it can also keep your table countertop free from scratches.
Multifunctional Use: Suitable for kitchen, parlor, bathroom, table and even outdoor barbecue. It can help you organize paper rolls efficiently.
Easy to Install: Please follow detail step-by-step installation instructions; premium stainless steel material, simple wipe to ensure smoothness, hassle-free maintenance.
description: Product Description Simple, Useful, Exquisite This is a classic designed kitchen roll holder. Consists of only one high-quality stainless steel vertical rod and a round base. Simple, beautiful and practical! Easy to Assemble Assemble a screw, a circular base, and a vertical rod, and a kitchen roll holder is done! Super easy! Stable Base A sturdy metal round base with a non-slip mat makes this kitchen roll holder stable and doesn't slide easily, while avoiding scratches on your table with the metal base!
